extension.description: Orion v3.5.2 - Complete media addon with Netflix-style interface. BIGGER thumbnails throughout. Netflix-style season selector and episode grid with BIG thumbnails (364x205px). Episode progress bars, "Continue Watching" badges, watched checkmarks. TV Shows and Kids Zone now use same Netflix-style season/episode flow. Multiple torrent scrapers, Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration.
extension.news: [3.5.2] TV Shows and Kids Zone now use Netflix-style Season/Episode dialogs with progress tracking. [3.5.1] Episode progress bars, "CONTINUE" badge, watched checkmarks. [3.5.0] Much BIGGER thumbnails throughout.
